Settings

Manually push all local data up to Supabase. Use this after a bulk import or if the sync badge shows an error.

📊 Analytics Table — Supabase SQL
Run this once in the Supabase SQL Editor to enable the Analytics tab:
create table if not exists analytics ( id text primary key, event_type text, page text, detail jsonb, device text, referrer text, session_id text, created_at timestamptz default now() ); alter table analytics enable row level security; create policy "public_all" on analytics for all using (true) with check (true); create index if not exists an_created_idx on analytics(created_at desc); create index if not exists an_event_idx on analytics(event_type);

Page Content Editor

Edit the About, Contact, and legal pages. Changes save to your browser instantly.

Bulk Import

Upload a CSV or Excel file to bulk-add Chefs, Resources, Recipes, or Blog Posts.

📥 Don't have a file? Download the template for the selected section:

📋 Editorial Note

ChefFind is an independent culinary creator directory. All chefs, books, courses, tools, and resources are featured purely on editorial merit. Our goal is to help food lovers discover the world's best culinary talent and learning resources.

© 2026 ChefFind. Made with ♥ for food lovers everywhere.

All chef information is for directory purposes only.

What is ChefFind?

ChefFind is the world's most comprehensive culinary creator directory. We curate and profile the best chefs, food creators, bloggers, and culinary educators across every platform — from Michelin-starred restaurants to TikTok kitchens.

Our Mission

We believe great food content deserves to be discovered. Our mission is to connect food lovers with the creators who inspire them — whether that's a three-star chef in Paris, a home cook in Manila, or a pitmaster in Texas.

Editorial Independence

Every creator in ChefFind is listed on editorial merit alone. Our affiliate disclosures are transparent and our reviews are honest.

Contact Us

Have a question, a correction, or want to be listed? Reach out at info@coastaldirectoryllc.com

✦ Legal

Privacy Policy

Effective Date: January 1, 2026  ·  Website: culinarycreators.com  ·  Contact: info@coastaldirectoryllc.com

Your privacy is important to us. This Privacy Policy explains what information ChefFind collects, how we use it, and your rights. By using this website, you agree to the practices described below.

1. Information We Collect

Usage Data: Pages visited, time on site, browser type, and device info — collected automatically via analytics tools.

Voluntarily Submitted Info: If you contact us or submit a form, we collect your name and email address.

Cookies: Small files stored on your device. You can disable cookies in your browser settings.

2. How We Use Your Information

To improve the website, analyze traffic, respond to inquiries, and comply with legal obligations.

3. Affiliate Links & Third-Party Sites

ChefFind participates in affiliate marketing programs including Amazon Associates. When you click an affiliate link and purchase, we may earn a commission at no extra cost to you. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of third-party websites.

4. Analytics

We use Google Analytics or similar services. Data collected is aggregated and does not personally identify you. Opt out at tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout.

5. Data Sharing

We do not sell or rent your personal information. We may share data with trusted service providers under confidentiality agreements.

6. Your Rights

You may have the right to access, correct, or delete personal data we hold. Contact us at info@coastaldirectoryllc.com.

7. Children's Privacy

This site is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect information from children.

8. Changes to This Policy

We may update this policy. Changes will be posted here with an updated effective date.

9. Contact Us

info@coastaldirectoryllc.com

✦ Legal

Terms of Service

Effective Date: January 1, 2026  ·  Website: culinarycreators.com  ·  Contact: info@coastaldirectoryllc.com

1. Acceptance of Terms

By using ChefFind at culinarycreators.com, you confirm you are at least 18 years old and agree to these Terms.

2. Prohibited Use

You agree NOT to: violate applicable laws; scrape data without permission; attempt unauthorized access to the site; transmit spam or malware; or reproduce site content without written consent.

3. Intellectual Property

All content on ChefFind is protected by copyright. Influencer names and handles belong to their respective owners. ChefFind claims no ownership over third-party intellectual property.

4. Affiliate Relationships

ChefFind earns commissions through affiliate programs. This does not influence our editorial decisions or the creators we list.

5. Disclaimer of Warranties

This Site is provided AS IS without warranties. ChefFind does not warrant that information is accurate, complete, or current. We do not personally endorse any influencer, product, or service listed.

6. Limitation of Liability

To the fullest extent permitted by law, ChefFind shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from use of the Site.

7. Third-Party Links

Links to third-party sites are for convenience only. ChefFind accepts no responsibility for third-party content.

8. Governing Law

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Florida. Disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Florida.

9. Contact Us

info@coastaldirectoryllc.com

✦ Legal

Affiliate Disclosure

Effective Date: January 1, 2026  ·  FTC Compliant

Quick Summary: Some links on ChefFind are affiliate links. If you click them and make a purchase, we may earn a small commission — at no extra cost to you. This helps keep the site free. We only link to resources we believe are genuinely useful.

Full Disclosure

ChefFind participates in the following affiliate programs:

  • Amazon Associates — we earn from qualifying purchases on book links.
  • Course & coaching affiliate programs — we may earn commissions on course purchases.
  • Software & SaaS programs — including business tools, CRMs, and financial platforms.

What This Means for You

  • You pay the same price as going directly to the seller.
  • Commissions come from the seller, not from you.
  • We do not accept payment to feature or positively rank any influencer or resource.

FTC Compliance

This disclosure complies with FTC guidelines on endorsements (16 C.F.R. Part 255).

Editorial Independence

ChefFind's listings are based solely on editorial judgment, not payment.

Sponsored Content

Any paid listings will be clearly labeled "Sponsored" or "Paid Partnership."

🎬 Top YouTube Chefs & Cooking Channels

ChefFind is home to the world's most complete directory of YouTube chefs and cooking channels. From Gordon Ramsay (22M) to Binging with Babish, Joshua Weissman, SORTEDfood, Italia Squisita, and Kenji's Cooking Show — every top YouTube cooking channel is here.

Browse YouTube recipes from Michelin-starred chefs, home cooks, and food scientists. Filter by cuisine, follower count, or specialty to find the perfect YouTube chef for your cooking journey.

📱 Best Instagram Chefs & Food Creators

Discover the best Instagram chefs — from Ottolenghi and Nigella Lawson to Cedric Grolet, Molly Baz, and thousands of culinary creators sharing Instagram recipes daily. Our directory covers every major kitchen influencer on Instagram.

Whether you're looking for French pastry, Italian pasta, healthy vegan recipes, or traditional Japanese cuisine — ChefFind's Instagram chef directory has 1,000+ verified culinary creators.

🎵 Top TikTok Chefs & Kitchen Influencers

Find the most-followed TikTok chefs — Keith Lee (16M), Nick DiGiovanni (8.5M), Emily Mariko (12M), Nino's Home (8M), and hundreds more TikTok kitchen influencers. Browse TikTok recipes by cuisine, cooking style, or difficulty.

ChefFind tracks every trending culinary creator on TikTok — from viral home cooks to professional chefs bringing restaurant techniques to home kitchens.
